summary: Completed testing of Iteration 49 - Dashboard Members Card, Analytics Members/Charts, Last Login Tracking. All 9 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified: Dashboard Members card with count 27 and Users icon linking to /admin/members, Analytics 'Members' metric (not 'Users') showing 27, Registered Members chart with data-testid='registrations-chart', Logged-In Members chart with data-testid='logins-chart'. Step 4 enrollment text overflow fix verified in code (overflow-wrap and word-break styles added).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 Dashboard Members Card and Analytics Charts fully tested. Dashboard has Members card at top of cards grid with data-testid='dashboard-card-members' showing count 27 with Users icon, linking to /admin/members. Analytics page has 'Members' metric (data-testid='metric-members') showing 27 from db.members collection. Two new charts added: 'Registered Members' (data-testid='registrations-chart') showing monthly member registrations, and 'Logged-In Members' (data-testid='logins-chart') showing monthly logins. Member login at /api/member/login now tracks last_login timestamp. Step 4 enrollment text has overflow-wrap and word-break styles to prevent text overflow.

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/analytics: PASS - Returns total_users from db.members (27), monthly_registrations array, monthly_logins array

frontend_dashboard.members_card: PASS - data-testid='dashboard-card-members' shows 'Members 27' with Users icon
frontend_dashboard.members_card_position: PASS - First card in the grid

frontend_analytics.registrations_chart: PASS - data-testid='registrations-chart' shows monthly registered members
frontend_analytics.logins_chart: PASS - data-testid='logins-chart' shows monthly logged-in members

enrollment_step4.text_overflow_fix: PASS - Code verified: overflow-wrap: break-word, word-break: break-word styles added
